description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex with a rectangular central courtyard surrounded by single-story structures. The main building features flat roofs, extensive use of glass windows, and multiple outdoor spaces, including a pool area and a covered carport. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan color, with some sections featuring wooden or terracotta accents. There are several distinct sections, including a detached garage or outbuilding and a covered patio or veranda. The layout is open and sprawling, with paved walkways and green lawn areas integrated into the design. The overall style is contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A sprawling modern bungalow with a central courtyard, flat roofs, large windows, and multiple outdoor living areas, including a pool and detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, covered carport, and the elongated structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open courtyard, extensive windows, and patio spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the covered carport, outbuilding, and the overall rectangular layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
